MODULE: cosmos.core.nlp.conversation
FILE: cosmos/core/nlp/conversation.py (212 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Conversation Handler for Multi-Turn NLP Interactions.

Maintains context across multiple exchanges.

CLASSES:
- ConversationTurn: A single turn in the conversation.
- ConversationContext: Context maintained across conversation turns.
- ConversationHandler: Handle multi-turn conversations with context.

Maintains state across exchanges 
  Methods: async def process(self, user_input: str) -> str
  Methods: def request_confirmation(self, action: str, prompt: str) -> str
  Methods: def get_history_summary(self) -> str
  Methods: def clear_history(self)
